description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a short-sleeved, collared shirt tucked into a pair of fitted trousers. He is wearing a wristwatch on his left wrist and a belt at the waist, with dress shoes completing the outfit. The figure has short, neatly styled hair and a trimmed beard, giving a well-groomed appearance. His arms are slightly extended outward from his sides, and his facial features are clearly defined with a neutral expression. The overall build is average, and the clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting a modern, urban style. The figure appears ready for a professional or casual urban environment.
description: A well-groomed adult male in a collared shirt, trousers, and dress shoes, standing with arms slightly outstretched. He wears a wristwatch and has short hair with a trimmed beard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the face, the wristwatch, and the fitted shirt and trousers.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the head, shirt, belt, and straight posture.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile showing the other arm and the overall slim fit of the clothing.
description_view_3: Front view displaying facial features, collared shirt, wristwatch, and both arms slightly outstretched.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved collared shirt and fitted trousers with a belt and wristwatch
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
